infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Radix needs access to your health data to monitor your treatment and provide personalized recommendations.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Radix needs to write health data to track your radiation exposure levels.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Radix uses your location to identify hospital zones for radiation tracking.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Radix uses your location to monitor radiation exposure continuously during your treatment.
